name: local-image-generator
description: Generate images locally inside Obsidian — SD-Turbo via WebGPU, no external software, no cloud.

scripts.gate: npm run typecheck && npm test && npm run check:pure && npm run build
scripts.deploy: npm run build && cp main.js manifest.json styles.css "${OBSIDIAN_PLUGIN_DIR:?set OBSIDIAN_PLUGIN_DIR}"/

author: Johannes Kaindl
